content: EventKit iOS 17+: requestAccess(to:completion:) deprecated and FAILS AT RUNTIME. Must migrate to requestFullAccessToEvents() or requestWriteOnlyAccessToEvents(). System may grant only Write-Only (Add-Only) access by default; users must manually navigate to Settings > Privacy & Security > Calendars > [App] and switch to FULL ACCESS. iOS 18 has known bug where calendar events disappear after update. com.apple.developer.eventkit.calendar entitlement must be configured or permission requests fail. Single EKEventStore instance should be reused; creating new instances shows stale data. Changes are auto-synced but may have CalDAV/Exchange propagation lag.
